texto: For throughout history, the synthesizing impulse has proved a powerful even world-changing, tool for understanding the universe, capable of penetrating the intricate,contradictory web of surface phenomena to reveal the universal,unified cosmos beneath--that fundamental,unchanging phenomenon we call truth.
explicacao: Citação de Gerard Helferich sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “For throughout history, the synthesizing impulse has proved a powerful even world-changing, tool …” articula reflexao, understanding, throughout em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
